sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95325" key="skuloxarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῡλο-χᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n95325.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">delighting in spoils</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">booty</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἔρωτες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.214</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Secund.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
